creator: tech-lists@zyxst.net
text:
OK - two tests, first one with the large table commented out (so pfctl -f returns without error), second one with it uncommented

1.

2. 
pfctl -f /etc/pf.conf with the large table enabled, so

# pfctl -f /etc/pf.conf
/etc/pf.conf:18: cannot define table pfbadhost: Cannot allocate memory
pfctl: Syntax error in config file: pf rules not loaded
